body_txt: Character Rerailment is what happens when a derailed character returns to their previous characterization. Generally this signals the end of an Audience-Alienating Era . This may also follow a changing of the guard at the asylum . May also happen repeatedly if a character bounces between writers . Sometimes the time spent derailed turns out to be All Just a Dream or Actually a Doombot . Sometimes used as an Author's Saving Throw , Salvaged Story or Forgot Flanders Could Do That . A temporary reversion to prior characterization is a Character Check . Can be an Adaptation Personality Change if this occurs in a new adaptation of a story that's been comprehensively derailed. See also, We Want Our Jerk Back! , "Flowers for Algernon" Syndrome , Circular Character Arc .
